# trips-frontend (React + Reshaped)

## Tech

- React + TypeScript (Vite)
- Reshaped for UI
- React Router for navigation
- Yarn (Berry) as package manager

## Conventions

- Prefer functional components and hooks.
- Keep pages in `src/pages/*` and reusable UI in `src/components/*`.
- Use `src/api/*` for API client calls.
- Keep types in `src/types/*`.

## UI

- Use Reshaped components; avoid ad-hoc CSS except for layout tweaks.
- Ensure accessibility and responsive layout.
